description: Curated website-facing CLI spec derived from an authorized Idealista.pt HAR capture.

tools.name: addetail-recommendation_get_addetail_recommendation
tools.description: GET addetail-recommendation {addetail_recommendation_id}. Required: addetail_recommendation_id. Optional: language. Returns the addetail_recommendation.

tools.name: detail_get_datalayer
tools.description: GET detail {detail_id} datalayer. Required: detail_id. Optional: typologyId. Returns the Datalayer.

tools.name: home_list_operation_typology
tools.description: GET home searchbox operation-typology. Returns the operation_typology.

tools.name: login-and-register-api_list_od
tools.description: GET login-and-register-api lara sl od. Returns the od.

tools.name: pt_get_configuration
tools.description: GET pt detail {detail_id} configuration. Required: detail_id. Returns array of ConfigurationWorldPhoneNumberPrefixe.

tools.name: pt_get_open_detail_gallery
tools.description: GET pt openDetailGallery {opendetailgallery_id}. Required: opendetailgallery_id. Optional: isVacational. Returns the openDetailGallery.

tools.name: pt_list_ad_contact_info_for_detail.ajax
tools.description: GET pt ajax listingController adContactInfoForDetail.ajax. Optional: adId. Returns the AdContactInfoForDetailAjax.

tools.name: pt_list_home
tools.description: GET pt locationsSuggest sale home. Optional: searchField. Returns the home.

tools.name: pt_list_pager
tools.description: GET pt detail pager. Optional: adId, isVacational, referer. Returns the Pager.

tools.name: pt_list_user_searches
tools.description: GET pt home user-searches. Returns the user_searches.
